note: The EPD reports a single 'Global warming potential' indicator (kg CO2 eq.) with no breakdown into fossil/biogenic/GHG. A1 (9.04E-01), A2 (9.73E-02) and A3 (4.91E-01) are given in separate columns and were summed to 1.4923 for A1-A3. Total over all declared modules is 2.55E+01. Declared/functional unit is '1 Tyre driven 1,000km, 0.01 per tyre'.
